description: An analyst detects a targeted spear-phishing campaign against high-ranking officials.

nodes.task_description: Identify the characteristics of the phishing emails (sender, subject, attachment) from initial reports.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies the indicators of compromise (IOCs).

nodes.task_description: Search email logs across the enterprise to find all users who received the phishing email.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst generates a complete list of affected users.

nodes.task_description: Remotely delete the malicious emails from all recipients' inboxes and block the sender's domain.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully contains the phishing campaign.
